event: Sunset over a river with silhouetted trees
symbols: sunset over still water — the beauty and transience of created order
silhouetted trees — the permanence of nature against the fleeting glory of light
description: A panoramic landscape showing a dramatic sunset over a calm river or lake. The sky blazes with intense oranges, reds, pinks, and golds, reflected in the still water below. Dark silhouetted pine trees frame both sides of the composition. A distant mountain rises against the glowing horizon. A fallen log extends into the water from the near shore at lower right. The trees and shoreline are rendered as dark silhouettes against the brilliant sky. The overall effect is of sublime natural beauty at the moment of day's end.
